name: Triangle Energy (Global) Ltd
description: Triangle Energy (Global) Limited is a Perth-based oil and gas company focused on building value through strategic production, exploration, and international growth opportunities. With core assets located in the Perth Basin and emerging projects across Southeast Asia and Europe, the company is strategically positioned to deliver long-term energy potential and portfolio diversification. Triangle Energy is committed to maintaining high standards of safety, environmental responsibility, and operational compliance while providing transparency to its shareholders through regular financial reporting and corporate updates as it pursues its growth strategy in the global energy sector.
